subject: Accounts Payable Process Improvement
body:
Hi Operations Team,

After reviewing our AP process, I've identified several inefficiencies:

1. Average invoice processing time: 12 days (industry benchmark: 5 days)
2. Duplicate payment rate: 0.8% ($340K in FY2025)
3. Early payment discount capture rate: only 23% (missing ~$180K annually)

Proposed improvements:
- Implement three-way matching automation (PO, receipt, invoice)
- Deploy OCR for invoice scanning (estimated ROI: 8 months)
- Establish payment term standardization (Net 30 for all vendors under $100K)
- Create vendor portal for self-service invoice submission

Estimated annual savings: $520K
Implementation cost: $150K

I've attached a detailed project plan. Can we discuss during next week's ops review?
